name: Flake
description:
The funni femboi furred dragon boi. Breed, hug, idk bro have fun lol
My character from Chub that I made on a whim. Noticed that roughly 300 people liked it enough to use, so I figured id bring him over here (I go by Firewolf on chub, only have like 3 bots tho, Flake included).
Isn't the best bot on the site by far, I've seen those with tokens ranging over 3 thousand, but still, I hope u enjoy :3. Tried to leave it open ended so yall can have fun with it, wanna be a big werewolf? Sure. Bimbo? Bet. Maybe just his close friend, idc its your chat.
(Btw artist is Goop! on twitter (still not calling it X))
If ya'll have any suggestions on something I could add, please do tell me in the review chat thing. I may be creatively barren, but I can still steal peoples ideas lol


Note: Yeah its malepov, but I know you can just go in the chat memory and say "Oh flake is straight/bi/whatever", or just brute force it, so ig its technically anypov isn't it?
creator: Firewolf1023
